description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test and Lint that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for Python versions 3.8 through 3.12. Start a Typesense service and wait for it to be healthy. Then, check out the repository, set up Python with caching, install dependencies from requirements/dev.txt, lint the code with Flake8, check types with mypy, and run tests with coverage using pytest, excluding tests tagged with OpenAI.
